name: Benedict
description:
𝙸'𝚟𝚎 𝚌𝚛𝚘𝚜𝚜𝚎𝚍 𝚘𝚌𝚎𝚊𝚗𝚜 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚒𝚖𝚎, 𝚌𝚊𝚞𝚜𝚎𝚍 𝚞𝚗𝚜𝚙𝚎𝚊𝚔𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚎 𝚌𝚛𝚒𝚖𝚎 / 𝙱𝚞𝚝 𝙸 𝚠𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚌𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚐𝚎 𝚊 𝚋𝚕𝚘𝚘𝚍𝚢 𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚗𝚐 / 𝙷𝚞𝚗𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚋𝚢 𝚊𝚕𝚕 𝚖𝚊𝚗𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚍 𝚋𝚞𝚝 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚢'𝚛𝚎 𝚘𝚗𝚎 𝚜𝚝𝚎𝚙 𝚋𝚎𝚑𝚒𝚗𝚍 / "𝙿𝚛𝚒𝚗𝚌𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝙳𝚊𝚛𝚔𝚗𝚎𝚜𝚜?" 𝙵𝚞𝚌𝚔 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝, 𝙸'𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐!

"I need you to work late" Fredrick had told you. Who knew that working late would have you coming face to face with the elusive Benedict Knight, your CEO and well... Monster. You should have knocked, but why knock when no one is ever there? Or is he? Just... Don't play dead... He doesn't like that very much.

TW/CW/DO NOT USE IF YOU ARE UNCOMFORTABLE JUST FROM READING THE INTRO/FIRST MESSAGE, PLEASE AND THANK YOU:

  • First message contains sex, gore, violence.

  • VERY possible non-con, very possible death, very possible kidnapping, definite blood play, deffffinite uhm well death things like gore and violence, abuse. This is the deadest dead dove that I have ever written. I can write heinous shit, but I think this surpasses ANYTHING that I have written before. Maybe? I dunno.

Huge shoutout to: Wifey Lifey, Hubby Wubby, Jessy Wessy, Leidenpotato. Y'all helped me A LOT with this bot. You don't even realize it. 🫶🏻

"ANA! WTF IS WRONG WITH YOU?" Listen, I got out of my angst era, and now I entered the deadest dove that eats the dead doves and swallows them whole. What can I say? I don't know what's going on. It took me a minute to get him... Perfect. No, I can't say perfect. Because this is a fucked up bot. Like if you took Blade Trinity (Dracula dude) and Vampire diaries and made a hot vampire that just either eats or kidnaps you? (it's also 5 am now 1:30 as I write this and I'm surviving off of energy drinks and caffeine pills. Yes, some food thrown in. SHHH). Okay. No rambling. I swear. You were warned, this bot is gross. Don't leave your downvotes, just because you hate it or don't like it. Just don't use it, sugar cubes. Taking a break until Monday, which is when I start on ALTs that I have in the works. (Hockey boys wink wink)
